title: Wither Rose Tweak│凋零玫瑰調整
description: Wither Rose's damage rate is changed to 1 second.│凋零玫瑰的傷害速率變為1秒。
body:
# Function│功能
Wither Rose now applies Wither I to mobs for 4 seconds, and applies it again when the Wither effect reaches 3 seconds. This increases the frequency of Wither Rose dealing damage to 1 second, but also causes mobs to take an additional 1 point of Wither damage after leaving the Wither Rose's area of ​​effect.│凋零玫瑰現在會對生物施加4秒凋零I，當凋零效果降低至3秒時會再次給予。這使得凋零玫瑰造成傷害的頻率增加到了1秒，不過這也讓生物在離開凋零玫瑰的效果範圍之後會額外受到1點凋零傷害。
# Purpose│目的
The purpose of this data pack is to fix a bug where wither roses are dealing 1 wither damage per tick after installing [Damage Optimization](https://modrinth.com/datapack/damage-optimization), which also nerfs wither roses.│此資料包的目的主要是為了修復安裝了[傷害優化](https://modrinth.com/datapack/damage-optimization)之後會導致凋零玫瑰每個tick都造成1點凋零傷害的問題，同時也順帶著削弱了凋零玫瑰。
